seo.title: Football & Bubble Soccer Hall
seo.description: Book your premium soccer or bubble soccer hall in Upper Austria. Perfect for birthdays and company events around Linz and Wels.

hero.subtitle:
Two perfectly maintained indoor fields await you in the Salamanda Soccer Arena, which give every game that certain something.

Experience football without compromise - regardless of the weather, dynamic and with the real feeling of competition and community.

bubble.title: Bubble soccer
bubble.description: Action-packed fun in huge bubbles for your team. Perfect for birthdays, team building or just letting off steam.

soccer.title: Soccer
soccer.description:
Experience football in Stadl-Paura.
The top location for players from the whole region.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about your kick with us. If anything is still unclear, just contact us!

0.q: Can you play without a reservation?
0.a: Spontaneous play is possible if there is a free space. However, we strongly recommend that you reserve in advance online or by telephone.

1.q: How far in advance can you reserve a place?
1.a: A place can be reserved up to 90 days in advance using our online booking system. If you would like to play at short notice, i.e. a few hours in advance, we recommend that you contact us by phone to check current availability.

2.q: Can I take out a regular subscription or a recurring booking?
2.a: Yes, if you want to play regularly - for example every week or every two weeks at the same time - that's no problem. In this case, please contact us directly via our contact page or by telephone so that we can set up an individual standing booking for you together.

3.q: What ground is the game played on?
3.a: The game is played on high-quality polytan artificial turf, which offers an optimal playing feel and maximum safety.

4.q: Which shoes can you play with?
4.a: It can be played with all standard sports shoes - cleated shoes are not permitted for safety reasons.

5.q: Are there showers and changing rooms?
5.a: Yes, there are free showers and changing rooms available for our guests. Please note that there are currently no lockers for valuables.

6.q: Is there parking available on site?
6.a: Yes, there are plenty of free parking spaces available directly in front of the Soccer Arena.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.subtitle: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. Here you can find out transparently how we process and protect your information at {company}.

0.title: 1. Responsible person
0.content: Responsible for data processing on this website within the meaning of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is:

1.title: 2. Collection and processing of data
1.content: We process personal data that we receive from you as part of our business relationship. The data processed includes in particular:

2.title: 3. Purpose of processing
2.content: We process your personal data in compliance with the provisions of the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Data Protection Act (DSG) for the following purposes:

0.c: To manage your seat reservations and related transactions.

1.c: To provide our services within the scope of the user agreement.

2.c: To contact us if you have any questions or make changes to your booking.

3.c: Analysis to optimize our offer and the website.

3.title: 4. Legal basis
3.content: Your data will be processed on the basis of the following legal bases in accordance with Art. 6 Para. 1 GDPR:

4.title: 5. Sharing of Data
4.content: Your personal data will not be transferred to third parties for purposes other than those listed below. We only pass on your personal data to third parties if this is necessary for the execution of the contract, such as the credit institution or payment service provider responsible for processing the payment.

5.title: 6. Cookies & Tracking
5.content: Our website uses cookies. These are small text files that your web browser stores on your device. Cookies help us to make our offering more user-friendly, effective and secure. We only use analysis and marketing tools based on your express consent. You can configure your browser so that you are informed about the setting of cookies and only allow cookies in individual cases.

6.title: 7. Storage period
6.content: We only store your personal data for as long as necessary to fulfill contractual or legal obligations. If the data is no longer required to fulfill contractual or legal obligations, it will be deleted regularly.

0.c: You can request information about your processed data.

1.c: You can request that incorrect data be corrected.

2.c: You can request the deletion of your data.

3.c: You can request the restriction of processing.

4.c: You have the right to data portability.

5.c: You can object to the processing.

6.c: Many data processing operations are only possible with your express consent. You can revoke any consent you have already given at any time.

8.title: 9. Security
8.content: We use technical and organizational security measures to protect the data we manage against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction or access by unauthorized persons. Our security measures are continuously improved in line with technological developments.

9.title: 10. Changes
9.content: We reserve the right to occasionally adapt this data protection declaration so that it always complies with current legal requirements or to implement changes to our services in the data protection declaration, e.g. when introducing new services. The new data protection declaration will then apply to your next visit.

footer.q: Do you still have questions about data protection?

barrierefreiheit.desc: Information about the accessibility of this website. {{company}} strives to make its website barrier-free accessible in accordance with the Federal Disability Equality Act (BGStG).
barrierefreiheit.scope: This accessibility statement applies to the website <1>{{website}}</1>.

1.title: Status of compatibility with the requirements
1.desc: This website is partially compliant with compliance level AA of the “Web Content Accessibility Guidelines Web – WCAG 2.1” due to the following incompatibilities and exceptions.

2.title: Non-accessible content
2.desc: The content listed below is not accessible for the following reasons:

a.title: a) Incompatibility with accessibility regulations
a.i1: Some images do not yet have alternative text, making this information inaccessible to screen reader users. We are working on continually adding to these texts.
a.i2: The contrasts in some navigation elements do not yet fully meet the required standard. A revision of the color scheme is planned.

b.title: b) Disproportionate burden
b.desc: Our videos do not currently have subtitles. We are working on a solution to implement this by default for new videos.

3.title: Preparation of the declaration
3.desc: This statement was made on <1>15. October 2023</1> created. The assessment of the website's compatibility with the WZG to implement the requirements of Directive (EU) 2016/2102 was carried out in the form of a self-test according to WCAG 2.1 at conformity level AA.

4.title: Feedback and contact details
4.p1: The offers and services on this website are constantly being improved, exchanged and expanded. Usability and accessibility are very important to us.
4.p2: If you notice barriers that prevent you from using our website - problems not described in this statement, deficiencies in compliance with accessibility requirements - we ask you to let us know by email.

5.title: Enforcement procedures
5.p1: If you do not receive satisfactory answers from the above contact option, you can complain to the Austrian Research Promotion Agency (FFG).
5.p2: The FFG accepts complaints electronically using the contact form.

ruckerstattung.desc: Information about cancellations, rebookings and refunds at {{company}}. We strive for fairness and transparency for all our players.
ruckerstattung.scope: This policy applies to all bookings of places, events and services via the website <1>{{website}}</1> or directly on site.

1.title: 1. General
1.desc: We understand that plans can change. Our refund policy has been designed to be flexible whilst ensuring our seats remain available to all football enthusiasts. By booking a place you accept the following conditions.

2.title: 2. Cancellations by Customers
2.desc: Cancellations must be made in writing or via the user account on our website. The amount of the refund depends on the time of cancellation:

mehr.title: More than 48 hours before the start of the game
mehr.desc: You will receive a full refund of the booking amount. Alternatively, the amount can be credited as credit for future bookings.

weniger.title: Less than 48 hours before the start of the game
weniger.desc: Unfortunately, no refund is possible as we are often no longer able to rent the space at such short notice.

3.title: 3. Rebookings
3.desc: Would you like to reschedule your appointment instead of canceling it? Rebookings are possible under the following conditions:
3.i1: Rebookings are possible free of charge up to 48 hours before the original appointment.
3.i2: The new date must be within 30 days of the original booking date.
3.i3: Price differences (e.g. change from off-peak to peak time) must be paid for.

4.title: 4. Refund in case of failure by the operator
4.desc: If {{company}} is unable to provide the booked space due to technical problems, maintenance work or force majeure (e.g. water damage, power outage), you will of course receive a <1>100% refund</1> of the amount paid.
4.note: * In such cases you will be contacted immediately by email or telephone.

5.title: 5. Special offers & vouchers
5.desc: Please note that bookings made as part of special promotions or paid for with promotional vouchers may be excluded from regular refunds. Purchased vouchers cannot be redeemed for cash, but remain valid in the event of cancellation (credit to customer account).

6.title: 6. Processing time
6.desc: We strive to process all refund requests as quickly as possible. Please allow us a processing time of <1>7-10 business days</1> for the amount to be credited to your original method of payment.

7.title: 7. Contact for Refunds
7.desc: Do you have questions about your bill or a specific refund? Our support team is at your disposal.

agb.subtitle: Please read these Terms carefully before using our Services. Transparency and fairness are important to us.

0.title: Scope
0.p1: These General Terms and Conditions (hereinafter referred to as “Terms and Conditions”) govern the use of the sports facility {{company}} (hereinafter referred to as “Operator”) by customers and visitors (hereinafter referred to as “Users”).
0.p2: By booking a playing field or entering the facility, the user accepts these terms and conditions in their currently valid version. Differing conditions of the user do not become part of the contract unless the operator expressly agrees to their validity in writing.

1.title: Booking & conclusion of contract
1.p1: Booking of playing fields is primarily done via the online booking system on our website.
1.i1: The contract between the user and the operator is concluded as soon as the user has completed the booking process and receives a booking confirmation by email.
1.i2: The booking confirmation contains all relevant details about the booking (date, time, seat number, price).
1.i3: The user is obliged to immediately check the information in the booking confirmation for accuracy and to report any errors immediately.

2.title: Payment terms
2.p1: The prices for using the playing fields are based on the current price list on the website. All prices are in euros (EUR).
2.i1: Payment methods: Payment is made online using the payment methods offered (credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay).
2.i2: Due date: The full invoice amount is due immediately upon booking or at the latest before the start of the game.
2.i3: Use of the space without prior full payment is not permitted.

3.title: Cancellation & Refund
3.p1: Cancellations must be made in writing (by email) or via the user account in the online booking system.
3.b1Title: Up to 48 hours before the start of the game
3.b1Desc: Free cancellation possible. The amount already paid will be fully refunded.
3.b2Desc: No refunds. In the event of late cancellation or no-show, the full amount will be retained.

4.title: Use of the facility & house rules
4.p1: The use of the facility is only permitted during the booked times.
4.i1: Users must leave the facility promptly at the end of their booking time in order to enable subsequent groups to start on time.
4.i2: The house rules posted in the appendix and the instructions of the staff apply.
4.i3: Entering the playing fields is only permitted with suitable sports footwear (no screw-on cleats).
4.i4: Smoking and alcohol consumption are prohibited on the sports areas.

5.title: Liability
5.p1: Use of {{company}} and its facilities is at your own risk.
5.i1: The operator is not liable for damage or injuries resulting from the use of the system, unless they are due to gross negligence or intent on the part of the operator.
5.i2: No liability is accepted for valuables, clothing and equipment brought along. We recommend that you do not leave any valuables in the changing rooms.
5.i3: The person responsible or the person making the booking is fully liable for any deliberate damage to the facility.

6.title: Cancellation by the operator
6.p1: The operator reserves the right to cancel bookings for important reasons (e.g. technical problems, unplayability of the course, force majeure). In this case, the amount already paid will be fully refunded. Further claims for damages are excluded.

7.title: Data protection
7.p1: The protection of your personal data is important to us. Information on the collection, processing and use of your data can be found in our separate data protection declaration.

8.title: Changes to the Terms and Conditions
8.p1: The operator reserves the right to change these terms and conditions at any time. The changes will be announced on the website and will apply to all bookings made after publication.

9.title: Place of jurisdiction & law
9.p1: Austrian law applies. Wels is agreed as the place of jurisdiction for all disputes arising from the contractual relationship if the customer is an entrepreneur or does not have a general place of jurisdiction in Austria.

footer.title: Do you have any questions about our terms and conditions?
footer.subtitle: Our support team is at your disposal.
